revision.comment: Create placeholder Shikinaisha page
revision.text: '''Otokuni-nimasuohoikatsuchino Shrine''' is a {{nihongo|Shikinaisha|式內社}} or a shrine in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|zh|延喜式神名帳|ja|延喜式神名帳}}. [[Category:Placeholder Shikinaisha pages]]
